data.title: Bit Digital Q3 revenue hits $30.5M as Ethereum transition gathers pace
data.description:
Bit Digital reported its third‑quarter earnings last night and said its revenue for Q3 2025 reached $30. 5 million, based on figures it released in its new filing. The company said the jump from the $22. 8 million it reported a year earlier came from strong activity in its WhiteFiber unit and higher staking income from Ethereum. […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/bit-digital-q3-revenue-hits-30-5m/

data.title: Bitcoin Market Top May Be In As Analyst Shares 1,064-Day Bull Cycle Pattern – Details
data.description:
In the last week, Bitcoin lost the $100,000 support zone, marking another drastic turn in an extensive correction phase. Since then, prices have traded as low as $94,700 as the premier cryptocurrency strives to find market stability. Amid rising speculations on the current status of the crypto bull run, market expert Ali Martinez shares a technical analysis that may yet confirm many investors’ fears. Related Reading: Massive Bitcoin Bid Walls Spotted On Binance: Bulls Step In With 2,800 BTC Cluster 1,064-Day Cycle Hints Bitcoin Bull Rally May Be Over Since hitting a new all-time high of $126,000 in early October, Bitcoin slipped into a heavy correction phase, losing 24
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/bitcoin/bitcoin-market-top-may-be-in-as-analyst-shares-1064-day-bull-cycle-pattern-details/

data.title: Chainlink, Hedera, and Avalanche Lead Real-World Asset Development
data.description:
Santiment’s latest developer-activity rankings reveal a major surge of work across Real-World Asset (RWA) ecosystems, with Chainlink, Hedera, and Avalanche taking the top three spots for the past 30 days. The dataset tracks GitHub commits, code pushes, upgrades, and development velocity across each protocol’s repositories, an increasingly important signal for long-term crypto strength.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/chainlink-hedera-and-avalanche-lead-real-world-asset-development/

data.title: XRP’s First U.S. Spot ETF Launches With Huge Demand But Market Turbulence Steals the Spotlight
data.description:
After years of filings, legal battles, and regulatory delays, the first U. S. spot XRP ETF made its debut on Thursday, a milestone that many in the industry once doubted would ever happen. Canary Capital’s ETF opened to immediate demand, pulling in close to $250 million on its first day and setting the stage for what […] The post XRP’s First U
source: https://www.ethnews.com/xrps-first-u-s-spot-etf-launches-with-huge-demand-but-market-turbulence-steals-the-spotlight/

data.title: Bitcoin Faces Its Longest Losing Streak Since Autumn as Bearish Momentum Intensifies
data.description:
Bitcoin is heading toward its third consecutive week in the red, a stretch not seen since early autumn, as sentiment deteriorates and institutional outflows continue to grow. What began as a sharp pullback has now evolved into a full technical and macro-driven reversal.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/bitcoin-faces-its-longest-losing-streak-since-autumn-as-bearish-momentum-intensifies/

The revelation was made by Walid Sheta, Schneider Electric’s Zone President […]

data.title: Brother Machi has increased his long position in Ethereum to 8,045 ETH, bringing his current position value to over $25 million.
data.description: Hyperbot data shows that Huang Licheng, affectionately known as "Brother Machi," has continued to add to his 25x leveraged long position in Ethereum, currently holding 8,045 ETH at a liquidation price of $3,054.18, resulting in a floating loss of $2.092 million. Furthermore, Huang has placed 11 limit sell orders for ETH in the $3,160-$3,400 range.

data.title: Coinbase: Trading of AI16Z-PERP is currently suspended.
data.description: Coinbase has announced that it has suspended trading of AI16Z-PERP. All remaining open positions have been automatically settled at the final settlement price of $0.031248 (USDC), which is the average index price in the 60 minutes prior to the trading suspension.

data.title: Russia enforces mining ban in Siberian regions
data.description:
Russia is reinstating a ban on cryptocurrency mining in two of its regions in Siberia, which will remain in place until the spring. The restrictions are aimed at avoiding electricity shortages in the territories during times of peak consumption in the cold winter. Russia shutting down crypto farms in Buryatia and Transbaikal Russian authorities are […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/russia-mining-ban-siberian-regions/

data.title: Russian hacker faces possible extradition to the United States
data.description:
A Russian hacker who was arrested and detained in the resort Island of Phuket in Thailand is awaiting extradition to the United States. According to reports, the Russian Embassy in Thailand is seeking access to a Russian citizen at the request of the United States over suspected cybercrimes. “At the moment, we are clarifying the […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/russian-hacker-extradition-to-united-states/

data.title: Planet Evening News | November 15
data.description: 1. OKX Star: 10 BTC reward for providing conclusive evidence of a backdoor in OKX Wallet; 2. Analysis: Cryptocurrency market capitalization has given back its year-to-date gains, and its correlation with macroeconomic risks may remain high; 3. Bitcoin mining company CleanSpark spends $460 million to repurchase 30.6 million common shares; 4. Aster clarifies that its token economic model remains unchanged, and future unlocked tokens will be transferred to a separate address; 5. Trump family-related Bitcoin mining company American Bitcoin releases Q3 earnings report: increased holdings by approximately 3,000 BTC during the quarter; 6. Michael Saylor: Strategy has been buying Bitcoin every day this week; 7. Analysis: Shifting market sentiment may expose retail investors buying shares in digital asset treasury companies to risk; 8. ETHZilla releases Q3 earnings report: Ethereum holdings increased to 102,273; 9. Hong Kong Securities and Futures Commission announces the reappointment of CEO Leung Fung-yee for a two-year term; 10. CryptoQuant founder: Funds are still flowing into Bitcoin, and the market may rebound at any time; 11. Trump posts a picture: a man dressed as the Phantom of the Opera holding "Trump". 2028”; 12. Binance: Users holding at least 240 Alpha Points can claim an ELIZAOS token airdrop.
